chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-754 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on withdrawal statement dated 22.05.2023 2. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 3. For hearing of CMA No.3090/2023 4. For hearing of main case 04-10-2023 Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’ Deputy Attorney General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through statement dated 22.05.2023 learned counsel for the petitioner has withdrawn this petition on the ground that NIRC has become functional. Accordingly this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
